name: agent402-llamaindex
description: Drop-in LlamaIndex TS tools for Agent402.Tools: turn 1,000+ pay-per-call web tools into FunctionTool instances, with auto-payment (proof-of-work free, USDC via x402 paid). Works with OpenAIAgent, AnthropicAgent, ReActAgent, and Workflows. Zero deps.
author: Mike Petrillo <mike@agent402.tools> (https://github.com/MikeyPetrillo)
